// Translation files for KrishiSahayak
export const translations = {
  hi: {
    // Navigation
    home: 'होम',
    diseaseDetection: 'रोग पहचान',
    chatAssistant: 'सहायक',

    // Chat Assistant

    searchCrop: 'फसल खोजें...',
    all: 'सभी',
    grains: 'अनाज',
    pulses: 'दाल',
    oilseeds: 'तिलहन',
    vegetables: 'सब्जी',
    fruits: 'फल',
    spices: 'मसाले',
